articles.content: The user also reminded residents to be cautious when charging devices overnight. "When we came downstairs, we saw very thick black smoke coming out of the windows. At around 8.30am, firefighters came down to check if anyone was injured," she said. "By then, the smoke had subsided and residents from the other blocks were allowed to return."
